briefdescription.para: Function that returns the index of the part of the brain in which a neuron is located.

detaileddescription.para:
Function that returns the index of the part of the Brain in which the neuron of index ind is located
ind
index of the neuron
brain
pointer to a brain
i index of the brain part
Condition**: Brain is a well formed and ind is assumed to be between 0 and brain.dimension

briefdescription.para: Function that returns the number of neurons in a specific brain part.

detaileddescription.para:
Function that returns the number of neurons in the brain part if index part, in the Brain brain
ind
index of the neuron
brain
pointer to a brain
number of neurons in the brain part

briefdescription.para: Function that returns the average percentage of connection chances for a specific neuron to the other parts.

detaileddescription.para:
Function that returns the average percentage (between 0 and 100) of connection chances for a neuron of a given type in a given part, to the other parts
brain
pointer to a brain
part
brain part index
type
neuron index
average percentage of connection chance

briefdescription.para: Choose and returns the neuron type for a neuron in a specitic brain part.

detaileddescription.para:
Choose and returns a neuron type for a neuron in the brain part of index "part", in the brain "brain"
brain
pointer to a brain
part
brain part index
neuron type

briefdescription.para: Function that generates (chooses) the types of multiple neurons and writes them in "types".

detaileddescription.para:
Generates the types of neurons from index "ind_start_neuron" to "ind_start_neuron + nb_neuron" in the brain "brain", and writes them in "types"
brain
pointer to a brain
part
brain part index
neuron type
Condition**: The memory allocation (malloc of size nb_neuron * sizeof(int)) for "types" must be done beforehand.

Function that displays a summary of the brain passed as a parameter (useful for debugging a brain)
brain
pointer to a brain

Function that frees a brain
brain
pointer to a brain
